item.title: AdamSchefter: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 2min Sources: the Falcons are trading DT Ruke Orhorhoro to the Jaguars in exchange for DT
item.description: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 2min Sources: the Falcons are trading DT Ruke Orhorhoro to the Jaguars in exchange for DT Maason Smith. 144 303 612 21 mil

item.title: FieldYates: Adam Schefter reposteó Field Yates @FieldYates · 4min The 35th pick in the 2024 NFL draft gets traded for the 48th pick
item.description: Adam Schefter reposteó Field Yates @FieldYates · 4min The 35th pick in the 2024 NFL draft gets traded for the 48th pick in the 2024 NFL draft! Cita Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 5min Sources: the Falcons are trading DT Ruke Orhorhoro to the Jaguars in exchange for DT Masson Smith. Hay una versión nueva de este post 19 28 238 40 mil

item.description:
